7 Pharmacy Cardiac medications, Blood thinners 22,000
8 Laboratory Cardiac enzymes, CBC, Kidney function 12,000
9 Radiology ECG, Echo, Chest X-Ray, Angiogram 18,000
10 Nursing Intensive nursing care - 11 days 11,000
11 Consumables Stent, Catheters, IV lines, PPE 35,000
12 Miscellaneous Admin, Ambulance, Food 8,500
TOTAL AMOUNT Rs. 3,94,000
Sum Insured Rs. 3,00,000
Amount Exceeding Policy Rs. 94,000
CLAIM AMOUNT REQUESTED Rs. 3,00,000
5. RISK FACTORS
Risk Factor Details
Age 60 years — High risk category
Previous Claims 2 claims in last 12 months — Rs. 1,80,000
Multiple Diagnoses 4 conditions: Heart Attack, CKD, Diabetes, Hypertension
Claim vs Sum Insured Claim (Rs. 3,00,000) = 100% of sum insured
ICU Admission 5 days ICU — Critical condition
Emergency Surgery Emergency PCI performed within 2 hours of admission
6. DECLARATION
I hereby declare that the information furnished above is true and correct. The patient suffered an acute cardiac event
requiring emergency intervention. All procedures were medically necessary and life-saving.
